title: Projects
text:
Projects




Dinner Emotions: UX/UI Design for Seamless Navigation
A dining experience shaped through thoughtful UX/UI design. Clean navigation, clear user flows, and intuitive interactions help users move effortlessly through every step.
View Project












Real Estate Website: UX/UI Redesign for User Engagement
A modern UX/UI redesign created to make property browsing more intuitive, engaging, and user-friendly. The experience focuses on clear navigation, better usability, and stronger user interaction.
View Project








Stock Market App: UX/UI Redesign for Usability
A modern stock market app redesign built to improve usability and reduce complexity. Every screen is designed to make tracking, analyzing, and trading feel easier and more intuitive.
View Project

SUBMIT

title: UX/UI Designer
text:
Profile
UX/UI Designer with 7+ years of experience turning complex POS, SaaS, and B2B workflows into clear, intuitive digital experiences. I design with research, empathy, and data to create interfaces that work better for people and perform better for the business, enhancing efficiency, accuracy, and user confidence.

title: UX/UI Designer
text:
Career
Senior UX/UI Designer
Mad Mobile, Sri Lanka & USA | 05/2022 - Present

Led UX research, personas, journey mapping, and usability testing to redesign POS checkout, menu, and order flows, improving speed and accuracy and reducing order-completion time by 30%.
Built a WCAG-aware design system and cross-platform component library in Figma/Sketch, improving UI consistency and reducing developer rework by 40%.
Created wireframes, prototypes, and interaction designs for A/B tests and data-informed iterations, collaborating with Product & Engineering in agile sprints for faster delivery.

UX/UI Consultant
Riskonnect Asia-Pacific, Sri Lanka | 01/2021 – 05/2022

Conducted UX audits, user research, and journey mapping on enterprise SaaS modules, identifying usability gaps and driving improvements in information architecture and navigation.
Redesigned complex workflows (risk, project planning, governance dashboards) using wireframes, prototypes, and accessibility-aware interaction patterns, improving task success by 25%.
Facilitated workshops and agile refinement sessions, aligning stakeholders on user needs and delivering dev-ready documentation for smoother implementation.

Senior UX/UI Designer
JRC Software, Sri Lanka | 08/2019 – 02/2021

Designed end-to-end UX for B2B, multi-tenant dashboards and admin tools, improving clarity and reducing support tickets through better information hierarchy and interaction design.
Built reusable UI components in Storybook and created responsive prototypes to validate features early, improving design–dev consistency and reducing build time.
Conducted usability testing with enterprise clients and integrated insights into accessible, scalable UI patterns across desktop and mobile.

UI Developer
John Keells IT, Sri Lanka | 08/2018 – 08/2019

Designed end-to-end UX for B2B, multi-tenant dashboards and admin tools, Designed responsive web/mobile interfaces using wireframes, user flows, prototypes, and visual mockups to improve onboarding, navigation, and engagement.
Enhanced information architecture and UI patterns, ensuring consistency and accessibility across client products.
Delivered dev-ready specifications and collaborated closely with engineering teams using HTML/CSS-based handoff guidelines.
